startPoint.en: Speak to Mabel at the barn north-east of Draynor Village.
startPoint.es: Habla con Mabel en el granero al noreste de Draynor Village.

items.name: Weapons and armour for at least 2 combat styles (or Necromancy)
items.display: Weapons and armour for at least 2 combat styles (or Necromancy)

rewards.name: Teleport to house
rewards.display: Any unused Teleport to house tablets (as many as 99).

rewards.name: Teleport to house
rewards.display: Ability to chip Teleport to house tablets.

rewards.name: Player-owned house/House styles
rewards.display: Dark Stone player-owned house decorating style (free).

rewards.name: Dungeon pit
rewards.display: Ability to build dungeon pits in your player-owned house.

rewards.name: Dominion Tower
rewards.display: Zenevivia can be faced in the Dominion Tower.

rewards.name: Love Story (music track)
rewards.display: Love Story (During the cutscene of the couple's previous love life)

postQuest.display: After returning Mabel's ring, Mabel gives a bankable lamp, which grants 10,000 experience in any skill over level 60. Mabel may be found hiding in a sack in the barn where you originally found her.

postQuest.name: Draynor tree guard
postQuest.display: After the quest, you can talk to the Draynor tree guard at Draynor Village and offer to chop down the tree to help him down; he will then reward you with 5,000 coins.

postQuest.name: Keldagrim
postQuest.display: Adventurers who have completed the quest may wish to travel to Keldagrim to talk to a dwarf called Runvastr, who lives on Keldagrim's east side in the house directly south of the pickaxe shop. If you deliver his diary to the Wise Old Man back in Draynor Village, you’ll earn the ability to chip House teletabs to take you to Trollheim as well.

steps.caption: The correct solution to the hay bale puzzle

text.en: Talk to Mabel in the barn east of the Draynor Village lodestone.
text.es: Habla con Mabel en el granero al este de la piedra vía de Draynor Village.

chatOptions: 1 Can you tell me what's wrong?
Accept
3 Okay, off I go.

text.en: Go up the ladder.
text.es: Sube por la escalera.

text.en: Solve the hay bale puzzle:
text.es: Resuelve el rompecabezas de las balas de heno:

text.en: As you arrive, go north once and push the one hay bale there all the way to the western wall.
text.es: Al llegar, ve una vez hacia el norte y empuja la única bala de heno que hay allí hasta la pared oeste.

text.en: Standing where you are, push a pair of hay bales at your immediate south twice.
text.es: Desde donde estás, empuja un par de balas de heno justo al sur dos veces.

text.en: Go one square east and push another pair of hay bales to the south.
text.es: Ve una casilla al este y empuja otro par de balas de heno hacia el sur.

text.en: Push the single hay bale directly west of you.
text.es: Empuja la única bala de heno directamente al oeste de ti.

text.en: Finally, push the two hay bales to the south of you to clear the path.
text.es: Finalmente, empuja las dos balas de heno al sur de ti para despejar el camino.

text.en: Pick up the ring.
text.es: Recoge el anillo.

text.en: Climb down the ladder.
text.es: Baja por la escalera.

text.en: Talk to Zenevivia.
text.es: Habla con Zenevivia.

chatOptions: 3 What's happened to Mabel?
2 Are you going to give Mabel her ring?
1 What do you want me to do?
3 Okay, off I go.

text.en: Search any hay bale for a twig, give it to her.
text.es: Busca en cualquier bala de heno una ramita y dásela a ella.

text.en: Talk to her again.
text.es: Habla con ella de nuevo.

chatOptions: 2 Will you return Mabel's ring and leave now?
2 I'm trying to complete this quest.
5 Alright, I'll accept. I'll make you regret this!

text.en: Go to Draynor Village and talk to the Wise Old Man.
text.es: Ve a Draynor Village y habla con el Wise Old Man.

chatOptions: 1 A woman called Zenevivia wishes to challenge us.

text.en: This option may not show up unless the quest Garden of Tranquillity is completed if you started it.
text.es: Esta opción puede no aparecer a menos que hayas completado la misión Garden of Tranquillity, si es que la has empezado.

text.en: After the cutscene, talk to him outside his house. If you have a familiar summoned then you must dismiss it to be able to progress.
text.es: Después de la escena cinemática, habla con él fuera de su casa. Si tienes un familiar invocado, deberás despedirlo para poder continuar.

chatOptions: 2 No.
1 Yes, let's go.

text.en: Head to the Rimmington house portal, talk to him again (Home Teleport works, teleport to Port Sarim and head west).
text.es: Dirígete al portal de la casa de Rimmington y habla con él de nuevo (Home Teleport funciona; teletranspórtate a Port Sarim y dirígete al oeste).

chatOptions: Any
3 How can we get in there?

text.en: When he leaves, walk to the house just east of the portal and talk to him once more.
text.es: Cuando él se marche, camina hasta la casa justo al este del portal y habla con él una vez más.

chatOptions: 2 Yes, I'm ready.

text.en: Open the "chipped" teleport to house tablet, solve the puzzle by dragging and dropping tiles from the left side on to the correct spots according to the photo here.
text.es: Abre la tableta de teletransporte a casa "astillada" y resuelve el rompecabezas arrastrando y soltando las baldosas del lado izquierdo hasta los lugares correctos según la foto de aquí.

text.en: 2 oak plank, 1 mithril bar, & 1 steel bar or Clockwork
text.es: 2 oak plank, 1 mithril bar y 1 steel bar o Clockwork

text.en: While standing next to the Wise Old Man, break the chipped tablet.
text.es: Mientras estás de pie junto al Wise Old Man, rompe la tableta astillada.

text.en: Enter the dungeon.
text.es: Entra en la mazmorra.

chatOptions: 2 Traps? Very dangerous. You go first.

text.en: After the cutscene, continue dialogue with the Wise Old Man.
text.es: Después de la escena cinemática, continúa el diálogo con el Wise Old Man.

chatOptions: 2 What are we going to build?

text.en: Craft via on the Clockmaker's bench in the workshop room.
text.es: Fabrica en el banco del relojero en la sala del taller.

chatOptions: 1 Yes.

text.en: Use the bench again to create a dummy.
text.es: Usa el banco de nuevo para crear un maniquí.

chatOptions: 1 Okay, I'll get on with it.

text.en: Enter the dungeon. During this part, there will be a pulsating purple light around your screen. Any players sensitive to flashing lights should proceed with caution.
text.es: Entra en la mazmorra. Durante esta parte, habrá una luz púrpura pulsante alrededor de tu pantalla. Los jugadores sensibles a las luces intermitentes deben proceder con precaución.

boldTerms: During this part, there will be a pulsating purple light around your screen. Any players sensitive to flashing lights should proceed with caution.

text.en: Traverse through the dungeon, deactivating all the traps by walking on them and then return to the surface.
text.es: Atraviesa la mazmorra, desactivando todas las trampas al pisarlas, y luego regresa a la superficie.

text.en: Pit guardian rooms have 2 traps each, except for the scabarite room, having only one.
text.es: Las salas de guardianes del pozo tienen 2 trampas cada una, excepto la sala scabarita, que solo tiene una.

text.en: Climb the staircase.
text.es: Sube por la escalera.

chatOptions: 1 Yes, get it out now.

text.en: combat gear/supplies
text.es: equipo/suministros de combate

text.en: Dragonfire protection
text.es: protección contra Dragonfire

text.en: Enter the dungeon.
text.es: Entra en la mazmorra.

chatOptions: 1 Yes, I'm sure I found them all. Let's enter.

text.en: Traverse through the dungeon, killing all the enemies (high-level players need not worry about using super antifire for the iron dragon as it is fairly weak and may be killed quickly).
text.es: Atraviesa la mazmorra, matando a todos los enemigos (los jugadores de alto nivel no necesitan preocuparse por usar super antifire para el iron dragon, ya que es bastante débil y puede morir rápidamente).

text.en: Enter the final door, talk to the Wise Old Man.
text.es: Entra por la puerta final y habla con el Wise Old Man.

chatOptions: Any
2 She's insane; let's kill her and leave!
4 Okay, let's go and face her.

text.en: Climb the stairs.
text.es: Sube por las escaleras.

text.en: Talk to Zenevivia to start the battle. If you fail your first attempts, return to the Wise Old Man at the house in Rimmington. Right click on the house teleport tabs to modify them for another teleport to the fight.
text.es: Habla con Zenevivia para comenzar la batalla. Si fallas en tus primeros intentos, regresa al Wise Old Man en la casa de Rimmington. Haz clic derecho en las tabletas de teletransporte a casa para modificarlas y volver a teletransportarte a la lucha.

text.en: Avoid the flames on the floor, they deal low damage.
text.es: Evita las llamas en el suelo, causan poco daño.

text.en: Zenevivia uses magic spells and flames on the floor that can quickly deal around 600 damage.
text.es: Zenevivia usa hechizos de magia y llamas en el suelo que pueden causar rápidamente alrededor de 600 de daño.

text.en: She will sometimes use protection prayers so prepare to switch attack styles or just use Necromancy.
text.es: A veces usará oraciones de protección, así que prepárate para cambiar de estilo de ataque o simplemente usa Nigromancia.

text.en: She can be knocked off pillars using abilities that knock back enemies, such as Kick.
text.es: Se puede tirar de los pilares usando habilidades que hacen retroceder a los enemigos, como Kick.

text.en: After she is defeated, talk to her.
text.es: Después de derrotarla, habla con ella.

text.en: You will return to Draynor Village.
text.es: Volverás a Draynor Village.

text.en: Talk to Zenevivia in the Wise Old Man's house.
text.es: Habla con Zenevivia en la casa del Wise Old Man.

chatOptions: 4 Have you still got Mabel's ring?
2 When will you give me Mabel's ring?
1 Stealing is wrong.
1 When are you going to attack?

text.en: Go upstairs and look through the telescope and watch the Wizards' Tower Robbery.
text.es: Sube las escaleras, mira por el telescopio y observa el Wizards' Tower Robbery.

text.en: Head downstairs, talk to Zenevivia again.
text.es: Baja las escaleras y habla con Zenevivia de nuevo.

chatOptions: 1 Are you going to try any more robberies?
1 Can I have Mabel's ring back now?

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: ¡Misión completada!
